title: PipeShare support queue context menu fix (dbg135)
description:
In the Customer support queue modal, clicking context menu items (Request Connection, Clear Request, Start chat, etc.) did nothing. Clicks were falling through to the user row underneath or losing to the document dismiss handler before the select handler ran.

This release fixes context menu hit-testing and event order: menu z-index is raised above modal layers, item picks use pointerdown with stopPropagation, and the support panel suppresses reopening the menu on the same click.

Who is affected: Horizon admins using PipeShare Customer support queue on OVH private server after deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Fix support queue user context menu: menu item clicks now run actions.
Raise context menu z-index above cp-modal-layer so clicks hit menu items.
Select menu items on pointerdown before document dismiss click runs.
Suppress support panel row handler from reopening menu on the same click.
